title: tf.keras.layers.LSTMCell  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Cell class for the LSTM layer.
Inherits From:Layer,Operation
This class processes one step within the whole time sequence input, whereaskeras.layer.LSTMprocesses the whole sequence.

parameters.name: keras.layer.LSTM
parameters.description: This class processes one step within the whole time sequence input, whereasprocesses the whole sequence.

parameters.name: tanh
parameters.description:
Activation function to use. Default: hyperbolic tangent
(). If you pass None, no activation is applied
(ie. "linear" activation:a(x) = x).

parameters.name: a(x) = x
parameters.description:
Activation function to use. Default: hyperbolic tangent
(tanh). If you pass None, no activation is applied
(ie. "linear" activation:).

parameters.name: sigmoid
parameters.description:
Activation function to use for the recurrent step.
Default:  (sigmoid). If you passNone, no activation is
applied (ie. "linear" activation:a(x) = x).

parameters.name: None
parameters.description:
Activation function to use for the recurrent step.
Default: sigmoid (sigmoid). If you pass, no activation is

parameters.name: a(x) = x
parameters.description:
Activation function to use for the recurrent step.
Default: sigmoid (sigmoid). If you passNone, no activation is
applied (ie. "linear" activation:).

parameters.name: True
parameters.description:
Boolean, (default), whether the layer
should use a bias vector.

parameters.name: kernel
parameters.description:
Initializer for theweights matrix,
used for the linear transformation of the inputs. Default:"glorot_uniform".

of the recurrent state. Default:"orthogonal".

Initializer for therecurrent_kernelweights matrix, used for the linear transformation

parameters.name: True
parameters.description:
Boolean (default). IfTrue,
add 1 to the bias of the forget gate at initialization.
Setting it toTruewill also forcebias_initializer="zeros".
This is recommended inJozefowicz et al.

parameters.name: True
